description: Analyze the homeschool lesson log to verify compliance with state minimum instruction hours per subject. Calculate the total hours for each subject, identify any deficiencies relative to the requirements, and highlight the non-compliant areas.

natural_language.prompt: A homeschooling parent needs to verify they've met state-mandated minimum instruction hours before an upcoming portfolio review. Analyze the lesson log, calculate total hours by subject using formulas, compare against requirements, and highlight any subjects that need makeup lessons.
